title: Impact Analysis Engine
purpose: Predict governance consequences before mutation by computing blast radius, protected domains, and affected invariants for any component.
architectural_constraints: Must use canonical topology for dependency resolution
Deterministic: same target always produces same report
Risk classification: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL
acceptance_criteria: Identifies direct dependents of a target component
Lists protected domains that would be unprotected
Lists affected invariants (validators that validate target)
Computes blast-radius score as percentage of total nodes
Classifies risk: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL
